summary: Kenneth Suna demonstrates a covered call strategy generating $600-$1,400 weekly ($50k-$70k annually) with approximately one hour of work per week: 20-30 minutes Sunday research, 30 minutes Monday morning execution including share purchases and call sales.
takeaways: Generate $600-$1,400 per week with covered calls on consistent basis
Sunday night research takes 20-30 minutes to compile list and evaluate premiums
Monday morning market open (9:30 AM) is execution window for refined pricing and news evaluation
Full execution cycle (buying shares + selling covered calls) takes ~30 minutes on Monday
Can generate $50k-$70k annually with under one hour weekly time commitment
Evaluate upcoming earnings dates before trade entry to avoid adverse moves
Monitor updated options premiums and pricing Monday morning before executing full position

strategy_candidates.change: Implement pre-market Sunday research process documenting specific premium levels and percentage returns for each candidate, then execute refined list Monday morning within 30-minute window
strategy_candidates.evidence: Kenneth explicitly describes Sunday 20-30 minute research phase followed by Monday 30-minute execution achieving $600-$1,400 weekly; this two-phase discipline with documented targets could be systematized for Brian's Premium Desk to improve consistency toward $1,250/mo target

title: $1200 a week with an hour of work #shorts
